x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: License entitlement records are the core dataset Now Assist SAM analyzes for AI optimization recommendations. Without sufficient entitlements, AI has no basis for identifying over-licensing, compliance risks, or cost reduction opportunities.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("alm_license"); ga.addQuery("active", true); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (count >= 50) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " active license entitlement records", finding: count + " active license records. Now Assist SAM has sufficient entitlement data for AI-powered license optimization analysis." }; } else if (count >= 10) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " active license entitlement records", finding: "Only " + count + " active license records (target: 50+). Now Assist SAM AI analysis will have limited coverage across the software estate." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: count + " active license entitlement records", finding: "Only " + count + " active license records. Insufficient entitlement data for meaningful Now Assist SAM AI license optimization recommendations." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Import software license entitlements from publisher contracts and procurement records. Navigate to Software Asset Management > Licenses > New to create entitlement records for all managed software titles.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_1e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851cd2
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[License entitlement records are the core dataset Now Assist SAM analyzes for AI optimization recommendations. Without sufficient entitlements, AI has no basis for identifying over-licensing, compliance risks, or cost reduction opportunities.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Active License Entitlements</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("alm_license"); ga.addQuery("active", true); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (count >= 50) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " active license entitlement records", finding: count + " active license records. Now Assist SAM has sufficient entitlement data for AI-powered license optimization analysis." }; } else if (count >= 10) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " active license entitlement records", finding: "Only " + count + " active license records (target: 50+). Now Assist SAM AI analysis will have limited coverage across the software estate." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: count + " active license entitlement records", finding: "Only " + count + " active license records. Insufficient entitlement data for meaningful Now Assist SAM AI license optimization recommendations." }; } })]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>SAM</module> <number>CHK0006246</number> <order>400</order> <remediation_guidance>Import software license entitlements from publisher contracts and procurement records. Navigate to Software Asset Management > Licenses > New to create entitlement records for all managed software titles.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>1e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851cd2</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
